title: The Agents Realize Their Mistake
description: On pages 17–18, the agents realize their mistake as while the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters.
scene: The Agents Realize Their Mistake. While the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We'll have to deal with him person- ally.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the agents realize their mistake. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
